REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. ACCORDING TO THE NOTICE OF MOTION THIS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS MADE SOLELY PURSUANT TO CCP 438. THIS STATUTORY MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS UNTIMELY. THE NOTICE OF MOTION TO DOES NOT LIST NON-STATUTORY/COMMON LAW AS GROUNDS FOR THE MOTION. ADDITIONALLY, WHETHER THE MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT IS MISCLASSIFYING THE CROSS-DEFENDANT AS IN INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR IS AN ISSUE OF FACT. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT XD DOES NOT ADDRESS PARAGRAPH "29 LEGAL CONSTRUCTION" OF THE MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT, WHILE ONLY POINTING TO 2 OUT OF 33 CLAUSES OF THE CONTRACT AS "ILLEGAL." PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F, HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Continued To Aug-04-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT TEMESGHEN GEBREMICHAEL MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. According to the Notice of Motion this motion for judgment on the pleadings is made solely pursuant to CCP 438. This statutory motion for judgment on the pleadings is untimely. The Notice of Motion to does not list non-statutory/common law as grounds for the motion. Additionally, whether the management agreement is misclassifying the cross-defendant as in independent contractor is an issue of fact. The Court also notes that XD does not address paragraph "29 Legal Construction" of the Management Agreement, while only pointing to 2 out of 33 clauses of the contract as "illegal."

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
